macro.intro: The macroeconomic landscape is marked by geopolitical tensions and inflationary pressures. The M2 Money Supply has increased to $22,667.3 billion, indicating potential liquidity concerns. The 10Y-2Y Yield Spread has widened to 0.53%, suggesting a modest steepening of the yield curve. The Unemployment Rate has improved to 4.3%, but the ongoing Iran conflict poses risks. No major economic events are scheduled today.

snapshot.note: Supply concerns due to Iran export halt

snapshot.name: S&P 500
snapshot.note: Approaching all-time high, RSI overbought risk

setups.name: Gold Safe-Haven Play
setups.rationale: Gold is trading at $1985.50, driven by safe-haven demand amid the Iran conflict. The increase in M2 Money Supply to $22,667.3 billion supports inflation hedging. The lack of major economic events today keeps focus on geopolitical risks.

metrics.label: M2 Money Supply
metrics.text: Increased liquidity supports gold as inflation hedge

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No major events, focus remains on geopolitical

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: De-escalation in Iran could reduce safe-haven demand, pushing prices below $1960.00

concerns.label: Secondary risk
concerns.text: Unexpected USD strength could pressure gold prices

setups.hedge: Consider shorting USD/JPY if gold position underperforms, targeting 108.00

setups.name: S&P 500 Overbought Correction
setups.rationale: The S&P 500 is nearing its all-time high at 4550.00, with RSI indicating overbought conditions. The Fear & Greed Index is unavailable, but geopolitical risks suggest caution. The lack of economic events today means focus remains on market sentiment.

metrics.label: Fear & Greed Index
metrics.text: Unavailable, but geopolitical risks imply caution

metrics.label: Yield Spread
metrics.text: Widening spread suggests potential economic caution

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Breakout above 4580.00 could invalidate short thesis

concerns.label: Secondary risk
concerns.text: Positive geopolitical developments could boost sentiment

setups.hedge: Consider long VIX if S&P 500 position underperforms, targeting 22.00

setups.name: EUR/USD Breakout Potential
setups.rationale: EUR/USD is trading at 1.0950, approaching key resistance at 1.1000. The improved Eurozone sentiment amid US-Iran talks supports a bullish stance. The widening 10Y-2Y Yield Spread to 0.53% suggests potential USD weakness.

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No events, focus on geopolitical developments

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Failure to break 1.1000 could lead to retracement below 1.0900

concerns.label: Secondary risk
concerns.text: Unexpected USD strength could pressure EUR/USD

setups.hedge: Consider short GBP/USD if EUR/USD position underperforms, targeting 1.2500

contrarian.body: WTI Crude Oil is trading at $85.30, driven by supply concerns from Iran's export halt. However, the potential for a US-Iran interim deal could ease supply fears, leading to a price correction. The widening 10Y-2Y Yield Spread to 0.53% suggests economic caution, which may impact demand.
contrarian.warning: A rapid escalation in the Iran conflict could push oil prices above $88.00. Monitor geopolitical developments closely for sudden shifts in sentiment.
